refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics
Traceable data storage schema for performance requirements
Version-controlled management system for baseline and calibration updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation algorithms, traceable storage, and version management to fulfill all sub-FRs cohesively

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation and storage due to traceability requirements
Version management tightly coupled with recorded data updates
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability and history management effectively.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission context data
Risk of complexity in integrating derivation, recording, and management functions into a single cohesive DP
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration complexity; consider modularizing if complexity or coupling becomes unmanageable.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context data necessary for performance requirement derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements and updates to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates and synchronization with external systems or modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the DP logically fits within this module; low diffusion risk due to centralized management.
Low containment; performance requirement derivation is not a vehicle-specific function, high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Very low containment; teleoperation focuses on control, not performance requirement management.
Minimal containment; safety services focus on alerts and policies, unrelated to performance requirement derivation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and history management effectively.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in the NGHE Solution module if too many functions are centralized
Risk of interface overload on Telemetry and Network Link if data volumes are high
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and interface load; consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and management capabilities.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review integration complexity within NGHE Solution module during detailed design
Validate interface capacity and performance for Telemetry and Network Link

decision.justification: The decomposition and assignments are sound but require refinement to address integration complexity and interface load risks before proceeding to next level.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To refine integration approach within NGHE Solution and validate interface design and capacity.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can support integrated DP functions
open_risks: Interface load on Telemetry and Network Link
evidence_needed: Prototypes or simulations of integrated DP within NGHE Solution
